stories.title: Sources: Clips, Raptors in talks on Kawhi trade
stories.summary: The LA Clippers and Toronto Raptors are in serious trade talks for forward Kawhi Leonard, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania.

stories.title: Ex-Titans, Cards RB Johnson says he has ALS
stories.summary: Former Titans and Cardinals running back Chris Johnson told "Good Morning America" that he was diagnosed with ALS in 2025.

stories.title: Sources: Suns land Bridges in deal with Hornets
stories.summary: The Hornets are trading Miles Bridges, a 2029 first-round pick and a second-round pick to the Suns for Grayson Allen, Royce O'Neale and a 2033 first.

stories.title: Gray no-hitter ends in 8th, Red Sox sweep Yankees
stories.summary: Jarren Duran singled home the winning run to cap a three-run rally in the 10th inning after Boston blew a two-run lead in the ninth, and the Red Sox finished a four-game sweep of the rival New York Yankees with a 5-4 victory Sunday night at Fenway Park.

stories.title: Scheffler, Hovland set for Mon. playoff at Travele...
stories.summary: Scottie Scheffler made an 8-foot par putt on the 18th hole Sunday, forcing a sudden-death playoff against Viktor Hovland on Monday at the rain-delayed Travelers.
